git.head: d5d183fa9d2cad168e8d8dcbc1139cede874217b
git.dirty_notes: Working tree has many untracked screenshot/evidence files under .reports/final-device-qa/ from prior QA cycles. No source files are dirty.

commands_run.notes: Vite production build OK. Warning: index-DxioK-gY.js bundle 1.22 MB (374 KB gzip) exceeds 500 KB chunk size warning.
Unit tests 729 pass; Playwright e2e: 25 passed, 24 failed, 11 skipped. P1.
Lint found 2 errors, 54 warnings. Full text report at 13b-lint-results-full.txt.

findings.details: Decoded JWT payload role='anon', ref='qzrrscryacxhprnrtpjd'. Public anon key — safe to ship to client. Not a leak.

console_log_residue.note: Production console.log calls remain in 7 source files. None contain obvious secrets. Cosmetic / log-spam concern only.

issues.title: Android lint: 2 errors (NewApi + UnspecifiedRegisterReceiverFlag) in ForceRingActivity.java
issues.description: android/gradlew.bat :app:lintDebug FAILED. Errors: (1) ForceRingActivity.java:64 calls KeyguardManager#requestDismissKeyguard which requires API 26 but minSdk=24 [NewApi]. (2) ForceRingActivity.java:159 registers stopReceiver for com.hyeni.calendar.FORCE_RING_STOP without RECEIVER_EXPORTED or RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED flag [UnspecifiedRegisterReceiverFlag] — required on Android 14+ targets. APK still builds (assembleDebug PASS); these manifest at runtime on lower-API devices or higher-API receiver scenarios.

issues.title: Playwright e2e: 24 of 60 critical-flow tests failing
issues.description: npm run verify failed at the e2e stage. Unit tests (vitest) pass 729/729, but Playwright critical-flows.spec.js reports 24 failed, 25 passed, 11 skipped. First observed failure: 'parent mode covers emergency, location, scheduling...' — expects img[name='혜니'] to be visible. Failures cluster around parent-mode dashboard / calendar / map-refresh redesign assertions. Does not block APK build; hand off to web/UI QA agent.

issues.title: Main JS bundle 1.22 MB (374 KB gzip) — exceeds Vite 500 KB chunk warning
issues.description: dist/assets/index-DxioK-gY.js is a single 1.22 MB chunk. Vite emits chunk-size warning. Not blocking but a startup / cold-load performance concern on mid/low-end Android. Recommend manualChunks split (kakao maps, supabase, qonversion).

issues.title: Android lint: 54 warnings (UnusedAttribute, BatteryLife, InlinedApi, etc.)
issues.description: lint reports 54 non-error warnings (see full report). Notables: BatteryLife — REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS may violate Play Store content policy if not justified (NotificationPlugin.java:251). UnusedAttribute — turnScreenOn/showWhenLocked declared in manifest target API 27+ but minSdk=24. None blocking, but Play Store review-time concerns.

issues.title: 27 console.log() calls remaining in production src/
issues.description: console.log present in src/App.jsx (6), src/lib/pushNotifications.js (7), src/lib/sync.js (6), src/lib/nativeLocationService.js (5), and 3 other files. No secrets in scanned strings, but production log spam.

issues.title: Gradle deprecation warnings (incompatible with Gradle 9.0)
issues.description: Both assembleDebug and test runs warn 'Deprecated Gradle features were used in this build, making it incompatible with Gradle 9.0.' Non-blocking now (Gradle 8.14.3), but blocks future upgrades.

non_blocking_concerns: Android lint errors (P1-01) should be resolved before Play Store release but do not block debug APK production.
Playwright e2e regressions (P1-02) indicate web-layer issues — hand off to web/UI QA agent.
